Localization.Description: A directory service object was accessed

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user with ID {subject.account.id} failed to access the directory service object "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} accessed the directory service object "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to access the directory service object "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} accessed the directory service object "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
